summary.ADJUSTMENT_POSITIVE: {actor} increased stock by {boards} boards ({meters} m) for {product} at {branch}.
summary.ADJUSTMENT_NEGATIVE: {actor} decreased stock by {boards} boards ({meters} m) for {product} at {branch}.
summary.COUNT_CORRECTION_POSITIVE: Count correction for {product} at {branch}: +{boards} boards ({meters} m) by {actor}.
summary.COUNT_CORRECTION_NEGATIVE: Count correction for {product} at {branch}: -{boards} boards ({meters} m) by {actor}.
summary.COUNT_CORRECTION_NO_VARIANCE: {actor} confirmed count for {product} at {branch} with no variance.
summary.SALE: {actor} recorded a sale of {boards} boards ({meters} m) of {product} at {branch}.
